markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review calibration articles and discuss content creation process for Flosum's blog](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented their AI-assisted content creation workflow using AeroOps](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Flosum to provide additional product messaging, tone examples, and preferred writing styles](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Publishing strategy discussed: 8 articles/week, with potential for staggered release](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Technical SEO issues identified (1,900 unindexed pages), to be addressed next week](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Image creation process and CMS integration to be further refined](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Workflow

  - [AeroOps used for article generation with extensive human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Process includes keyword research, AI context setting, polishing instructions, and manual editing](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Flosum to provide additional product messaging and writing style examples](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [GrowthX moving to a more robust internal platform for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

### Content Publishing Strategy

  - [Goal: 8 articles per week after initial ramp-up](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Discussion on publishing frequency to balance SEO benefits and content presentation](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Options include staggered release (1-2 articles per day) or bulk publishing](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX to handle content staging in Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

### SEO and Technical Issues

  - [1,900 unindexed pages identified in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Many 404 errors from migration from HubSpot to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [Jakub to review and provide recommendations for redirects and site health improvements](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Ahrefs setup for additional SEO monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Image Creation

  - [Current process: Designer-generated images using Acrobat and Photoshop](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to create AI-generated images using Midjourney or Canva](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Agreement to stick to brand colors and explore different styles](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### Content Alignment and CMS Integration

  - [Flosum currently lacks internal content calendar; GrowthX's calendar to be primary guide](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [GrowthX engineer to connect AeroOps to Webflow for automatic article pushing](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [Webflow access to be provided to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Flosum to review and provide feedback on calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Flosum to send additional product messaging, tone examples, and writing styles](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [GrowthX to send Webflow access request email](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Jakub to review SEO issues and provide recommendations next week](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore AI-generated image options for articles](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [GrowthX to set up automatic pushing of articles to Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/vaofsFG7rVKSSakU3CqBjCn6PaxYys5y?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
